query:
insert or replace into UsableTestRuns (
                last_collect_nr,
                product_id,
                test_run_name,
                test_run_date
            )
            select
                last_collect_nr,
                product_id,
                test_run_name,
                test_run_date
            from PassedTestRuns
            where last_collect_nr = $1 and product_id = $2
            except
            select
                last_collect_nr,
                product_id,
                test_run_name,
                test_run_date
            from ObsoleteTestRuns
